description: Style Note Casual weekends call for an injection of easy-going attitude, which is exactly what this pair of shorts from indian terrain offers. In a self colour, these shorts offer a typically refined way to step out in style. Pair this lightweight pair with a fitting tee for a dapper look at impromptu gatherings Product DetailsBrown shorts that have two insert pockets on the sides, broad and comfortable waistband with loops, two double welt pockets at the back with buttoned closures, brand badge above the right welt pocket at the back with a zipped and buttoned closure on the front Material and Care 52% cotton and 48% linen Machine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height:6' and waist: 32") is wearing a size 32
